source.name: IBM Carbon Design System
source.license_notes: Use source links and summarized guidance only; do not copy full documentation verbatim.

layout_rules: Explain why content is missing and what normally appears there.
Provide a next action when the user can recover or start.
Keep the empty state visually subordinate to the surrounding product shell.
accessibility_notes: Do not rely on illustration alone to communicate the state.
Make the action button text specific and reachable by keyboard.
implementation_hints: Use empty states as product guidance, not just decoration.
Differentiate empty because new, empty because filtered, and empty because error.

retrieval.ai_summary: Use Carbon empty-state patterns to explain missing data, distinguish the cause, and offer a clear next action without making the user feel blocked or blamed.
